"'''Sweet Lady from Alderaan'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] associated with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].<ref name="Zorba" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="Readers">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> the [[New Republic pilot/Legends|New Republic pilot]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] hosted a housewarming party in his [[Han Solo's sky house|sky house]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], where the guest of honor was the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. After the two danced until they were out of breath and laughing, Solo asked the band to play "Sweet Lady from Alderaan," hoping to make Organa happy. Instead, the song brought [[Water/Legends|tears]] to her [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], as it reminded her of the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Zorba" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Sweet Lady from Alderaan" appeared in ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'', a [[1992]] junior novel and the second entry in the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|''Jedi Prince'']] series by [[Paul Davids|Paul]] and [[Hollace Davids]].<ref name="Zorba" />

*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
